data.biography:
Lapisara Intarasut, nicknamed Apple, is a singer and actress from Kamphaeng Phet Province, Thailand. She has an older brother. She is studying at Faculty of Fine and Applied Arts, Major in Acting & Directing, from Sinakharinwirot University (Prasanmit). Lapisara would like to be a producer or a director.

When she was 16, she moved to Bangkok to take part in a reality TV show, The Star Season 7. She explained that she signed up to audition to help the family financially.
data.name: Lapisara Intarasut
